subject: [PATCH 3/8] mm: use zone lock guard in unreserve_highatomic_pageblock()

reviews.author: Steven Rostedt
reviews.summary: Suggested simplifying the code by removing unnecessary braces around a single-line return statement.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the locking mechanism in the mm/page_alloc.c file by replacing explicit lock/unlock patterns with automatic scope-based cleanup using zone locks.
